comment: Single source for the PCF Fluent pin. Every PCF that bundles @fluentui/react-components must declare exactly this version, and (unless listed in tabsterFree) exactly these overrides, or `npm run verify` fails (scripts/check-pcf-pins.mjs). The values are the model-driven host's platform-library floor; the re-pin runbook in docs/deployment.md says how to read the host's live versions and when to update this file.
tabsterFreeComment: Controls proven not to touch the shared tabster instance (display-only surfaces, skew-tested on a live form). They must NOT carry the overrides, so they keep demonstrating that a tooltip-only PCF needs no pin.
